---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

A clear and concise description of the problem or gap this feature would address.
Example: "I find it difficult to export annotations in a format other than JSON..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of the feature you would like to see added. Include any relevant UI/UX details if applicable.

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches, workarounds, or existing tools you have tried or considered, and why they do not fully meet the need.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, screenshots, or links to related issues or discussions that might help evaluate this request.
